description_long: This is a black, wide-brimmed hat with a classic Western or cowboy style, featuring a slightly domed, flat-topped crown. The hatband is dark brown leather, adorned with metallic studs and a prominent silver star emblem at the front, as well as a silver buckle on the side. The brim is broad, flat, and subtly curves downward at the edges, providing ample shade. The surface of the hat appears to be made of a matte, slightly worn leather, giving it a rugged, utilitarian look. The crown is structured and maintains its shape, while the brim is firm but not overly stiff. This hat would be suitable for both functional sun protection and as a stylish accessory in urban or Western-themed environments.
description: A black, wide-brimmed cowboy hat with a brown leather band, silver star emblem, and buckle, made of matte leather with a structured crown and flat brim.
description_view_0: Front view showing the silver star emblem centered on the brown leather hatband and the wide, flat brim.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the silver buckle on the hatband and the hat's broad, downward-curved brim.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain back of the hatband with visible metallic studs and the continuous wide brim.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the hatband's metallic studs and the brim's consistent width and shape.
attribute_brim_style: wide and flat with a slight downward curve
